title: madhuca stylosa
intro: Madhuca stylosa, also known as the 'Butter Tree', is a species of tree in the Sapotaceae family that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of this tree are attributed to its seeds, which contain a high concentration of butter oil, used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Madhuca stylosa seeds include their anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of Madhuca stylosa seeds include oil extractions, which can be used topically or orally, and powdered forms, which can be added to traditional remedies or supplements.
